reasoning_content: Now let me also add support for handling function parameters. Let me update the FunctionDecl handler to process parameters:

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "sed -i 's/  auto& entryIrb = \\*mCurIrb;/  auto\\& entryIrb = *mCurIrb;\\n\\n  unsigned i = 0;\\n  for (auto\\& arg : func->args()) {\\n    if (i < obj->params.size()) {\\n      auto* paramDecl = obj->params[i]->dcst<VarDecl>();\\n      if (paramDecl) {\\n        auto* alloca = entryIrb.CreateAlloca(self(paramDecl->type), nullptr, paramDecl->name);\\n        paramDecl->any = alloca;\\n        entryIrb.CreateStore(\\&arg, alloca);\\n      }\\n      i++;\\n    }\\n  }/' /workspace/YatCC/task/3/EmitIR.cpp", "summary": "Add function parameter handling"}
